creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed against 7-STABLE, thanks for your submission! 

(Note: the committed changeset is slightly different from the 
submission where two change from minor() to dev2unit() were 
omitted, in tw_osl_freebsd.c.  I have kept the proposed patch's 
driver version number although this is a MFC of 8-STABLE/CURRENT 
driver.)
